text: Morning team. This is release week for PixelForge v0.2. Today's focus: wrap up UI components and get the schedule sorted out.
Here's the v0.2 release schedule! Check out docs/v02-schedule.md for the full breakdown and critical path.
Morning all. UI components landed yesterday — nice one, Kai. Today we're tackling the API endpoints and docs.
v0.2 progress update: UI Components done, API Endpoints done. Only the release checklist remains! Looking good for tomorrow's launch.
Morning team. Today is release day for v0.2. Kai's on the release checklist. Let's make this a clean launch.
